<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:中山神社 (美濃加茂市)]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|中山神社 (美濃加茂市)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Nakayama Shrine (Q11364249)
| native_name = 中山神社
| image = Nakayama shrine.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Nakayama Shrine (Q11364249)
| coordinates = {{coord|35.46736111111111|137.08575}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Kanayamahiko|lt=Kanayamahiko|es|Kanayamahiko y Kanayamahime|ja|金山彦神|pl|Kanayamahiko|zh|金山毘古神|WD=Q4387856}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Nakayama Shrine'''|中山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|WD=Q134917287}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181957</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181957</ref>
** Series ordinal: 1416


== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province|ja|美濃国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11609223}}
** Series ordinal: 35
** P155: {{ill|Tai Shrine|lt=Tai Shrine|ja|多為神社 (関市)|WD=Q11430893}}
** P156: {{ill|Sakamotono Shrine|lt=Sakamotono Shrine|WD=Q135039908}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Minokamo, Gifu|lt=Minokamo|ar|مينوكامو غيفو|azb|مینوکامو، قیفو|ceb|Minokamo|ce|Минокамо|de|Minokamo|en|Minokamo, Gifu|es|Minokamo|fa|مینوکامو، گیفو|fi|Mino-Kamo|fr|Minokamo|gl|Minokamo|it|Minokamo|ja|美濃加茂市|ko|미노카모시|mg|Minokamo|mzn|مینوکامو، گیفو|nl|Minokamo|pl|Minokamo|pt|Minokamo|ro|Minokamo|ru|Минокамо|su|Minokamo, Gifu|sv|Minokamo|tg|Минокамо|tl|Minokamo, Gifu|tr|Minokamo|tt|Минокамо|uk|Міно-Камо|vi|Minokamo, Gifu|war|Minokamo, Gifu|zh-classical|美濃加茂市|zh_min_nan|Minokamo-chhī|zh_yue|美濃加茂|zh|美濃加茂市|WD=Q857305}}
* {{ill|Mino Province|lt=Mino Province|ckb|پارێزگای مینۆ|cs|Mino (provincie)|de|Provinz Mino|en|Mino Province|es|Provincia de Mino|eu|Mino probintzia|fa|ولایت مینو|fr|Province de Mino|gl|Provincia de Mino|hak|Mî-nùng-koet|id|Provinsi Mino|it|Mino (provincia)|ja|美濃国|ko|미노국|lt|Mino žemė|nl|Mino (provincie)|pt|Província de Mino|ru|Мино (провинция)|simple|Mino Province|sk|Mino (provincia)|sr|Провинција Мино|th|แคว้นมิโนะ|tr|Mino (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Міно|vi|Tỉnh Mino|wuu|美濃国|zh_min_nan|Mino-kok|zh_yue|美濃國|zh|美濃國|WD=Q864156}}
* {{ill|Kamo District, Gifu|lt=Kamo district|ceb|Kamo-gun (distrito sa Hapon, Gifu-ken)|en|Kamo District, Gifu|es|Distrito de Kamo (Gifu)|fr|District de Kamo (Gifu)|id|Distrik Kamo, Gifu|it|Distretto di Kamo (Gifu)|ja|加茂郡|ko|가모군 (기후현)|pl|Powiat Kamo|pt|Distrito de Kamo|th|อำเภอคาโมะ|uk|Повіт Камо (Ґіфу)|vi|Kamo (quận)|zh|加茂郡|WD=Q1348656}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.46736111111111|137.08575}}

== image (P18) ==

* Nakayama shrine.jpg

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181957
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}}

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) ==

* 5200005006538

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Nakayamano Shrine|lt=Nakayamano Shrine|WD=Q135039907}}

==References==

[[Category:Shikinaisha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]]
[[JA:中山神社 (美濃加茂市)]]

{{wikidata link|Q11364249}}
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]

{{translated page|ja|中山神社 (美濃加茂市)|version=107302249|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{神社
 | 名称=中山神社
 | 画像=[[File:Nakayama shrine.jpg|250px]]<br />鳥居と拝殿
 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|美濃加茂市|Q857305}}下米田町信友697
 | 位置={{Coord|35|28|2.48|N|137|5|8.66|E|type:landmark_region:JP-21|display=inline,title}}
 | 祭神={{jalink|金山彦神|Q4387856|金山彦命}}
 | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社}}
 | 創建=不明
 | 本殿=
 | 例祭=4月第1日曜日
 | 神事=
 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=中山神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}}
}}
'''中山神社'''（なかやまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|美濃加茂市|Q857305}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。

{{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}{{jalink|加茂郡|Q1348656|賀茂郡}}{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の中山神社の論社である（もう一つの論社は{{jalink|諏訪神社 (美濃加茂市)|Q11631934|諏訪神社}}）。

== 沿革 ==
創建時期は不明。{{jalink|永禄|Q1143341}}年間に兵火で焼失しており、それ以前の記録は存在しない。

{{jalink|永禄|Q1143341}}12年（{{jalink|1569年|Q6653}}）に再建。以後{{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}、{{jalink|寛永|Q1192913}}、{{jalink|延宝|Q1145735}}年間に社殿の造営、再建の記録がある。

{{jalink|諏訪神社 (美濃加茂市)|Q11631934|諏訪神社}}は{{jalink|米田城}}城主{{jalink|肥田玄蕃}}の命で中山神社を移転再建したさい、{{jalink|信濃国|Q289250}}{{jalink|諏訪大社|Q218813}}を祀り、諏訪神社に改称したという。現在の中山神社は元の位置に再建した神社と推測される。

== 祭神 ==
*{{jalink|金山彦神|Q4387856|金山彦命}}
*:{{jalink|建御名方神}}の説もある

== 脚注 ==
{{Reflist}}

{{shinto-stub}}


==End Japanese==
[[Category:岐阜県の神社]]
[[Category:美濃加茂市の歴史]]
[[Category:美濃国の式内社]]
[[Category:岐阜県の旧郷社]]
[[Category:美濃加茂市の建築物]][[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
